'''Sihha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] student of astrogation at [[Garqi Agricultural University]] and friend of [[Dynba Tesc]]. He was one of many students who were disgruntled with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and began [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]] into their mainframe on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. He along with Dynba and [[Arali Dil]] [[Great Evacuation|escaped]] Garqi onboard the ''[[Star's Delight]]'' thanks to the help of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]].<ref name="MC" />
